title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.351 - Missouri Donate Life Day designated for April 16
text:
9.351.  Missouri Donate Life Day designated for April 16. — The sixteenth of April each year is hereby designated as "Missouri Donate Life Day" in the state of Missouri.  The citizens of this state are encouraged to participate in appropriate activities and events to increase public awareness of the need for organ donation and organ donors.
(L. 2022 H.B. 1738)
